name: Fonterra Co-operative Group Limited 4.42% BDS 07/03/2023 NZD5000
summary: Fonterra Co-operative Group Limited 4.42% BDS 07/03/2023 NZD5000 is a bond issued by Fonterra Co-operative Group Limited. This is a debt instrument with a specific maturity date and interest rate. Fonterra is a multinational dairy cooperative based in New Zealand.
